name: 2012 Holiday Pack
white: A Christmas stocking full of coleslaw.

black.text: After blacking out during New Year's Eve, I was awoken by ___.
Every Christmas, my uncle gets drunk and tells the story about ___.
On the third day of Christmas, my true love gave to me: three French hens, two turtle doves, and ___.
This is a little embarrassing but I was wondering if you could recommend a doctor who specializes in ___.
Wake up, America. Christmas is under attack by secular liberals and their ___.
What keeps me warm during the cold, cold winter?
